name: add-setting-env
tagline: Procedure for wiring a server-side env var into user-settings defaults across env, types, server config, and store layers.
verdict: Clear, deterministic, well-exampled workflow with a stated priority order and a full worked example (AI_IMAGE_DEFAULT_IMAGE_NUM). Minor weakness: the .env.example update step has no check against a duplicate entry on re-run; no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: .env.example update step has no check for a pre-existing entry before appending on a re-run.
No version field or changelog section.
